code:
sequenceDiagram participant S as Slack Client participant A as Slack API participant MC as Memcached participant V as Vitess Datastore participant M as Mcrib Control Plane participant C as Consul S->>A: Client boot request A->>MC: Fetch data from cache A->>V: Fetch data from database on cache miss C->>MC: Health checks, registration C->>C: Perform Consul agent restart on 25% of the fleet note over C: On restart, evicts Memcached hosts it's running on M->>C: Get healthy Memcached hosts M->>MC: Replace "unhealthy" Memcached node
with empty cache nodes Note over MC,C: Cache hit rate drops, database load increases, and cascading failure begins A-->>S: Slow client boot response or failure

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个时序图，展示Mcrib控制平面那次故障的完整链路。核心是从Slack Client发起boot request开始，经过Slack API，然后涉及到Memcached缓存和Vitess数据库的交互。
明白，那Consul在里面的角色是什么？我看故障复盘里提到Consul agent重启是触发点。
对，Consul是关键。它要定期对Memcached做health checks和registration。而且那次事故是因为Consul agent在25%的机器上同时重启，导致这些机器上的Memcached host被evict了。这个得用note标出来。
好，我已经把Consul到Memcached的健康检查链路画上了，也加了那个note说明evict的情况。接下来Mcrib Control Plane怎么介入？
Mcrib Control Plane会从Consul获取healthy Memcached hosts，然后执行替换逻辑——把标记为unhealthy的节点换成empty cache nodes。这里要注意，替换后其实新节点是空的，所以是个关键问题点。
替换逻辑我画成Mcrib到Memcached的箭头，标注Replace unhealthy node with empty cache nodes。然后最终结果是不是要体现cache hit rate下降、数据库负载飙升的cascading failure？
没错，这个note要横跨Memcached和Consul两个participant，说明cache hit rate drops和database load increases，最终导致cascading failure。最后别忘了用户侧的反馈——Slack API返回给Client的是slow response或者直接failure。
完成了。整个链路从Slack Client boot request开始，经过API到缓存和数据库，中间Consul重启触发evict，Mcrib替换空节点，最后cache miss导致数据库过载，用户端收到慢响应或失败。我检查一下，Slack API到Slack Client的返回线用虚线表示异步的slow response。
